en_title: Super Yooka-Laylee Kart Preview: Ex-Rare Devs Take Aim at Reviving the Spirit of Diddy Kong Racing
cn_title: 《Super Yooka-Laylee Kart》前瞻：前Rare成员续写《迪迪刚赛车》传奇
subtitle: 规则随你玩
opus_summary: 由前Rare成员开发的《Super Yooka-Laylee Kart》在夏日游戏节亮相，支持8人对战，最大亮点是完全可自定义的比赛规则。试玩版操控稍滑但画面多彩，团队承诺优化，目标打造史上最具重玩性的卡丁车游戏。

paragraphs.en: There is just something about mascot characters and kart racers that makes them fit together like two peas in a pod. Ever since the first Mario Kart game was released on the Super Nintendo, it’s been a genre that continues to delight fans, even in the wild times we find ourselves in. Now, the lizard and bat combo of Yooka-Laylee is hopping into the driver's seat of Super Yooka-Laylee Kart, revealed during this year's Summer Game Fest, and IGN had a chance to get some time on the track with this upcoming racer from some of the same devs that worked on the much-loved Diddy Kong Racing!
paragraphs.cn: 吉祥物角色和卡丁车竞速似乎天生绝配。自从第一款《马力欧卡丁车》登陆超级任天堂以来，这个类型一直为粉丝带来欢乐，即便在今天这个疯狂的时代也不例外。现在，Yooka-Laylee这对蜥蜴和蝙蝠组合跃入《Super Yooka-Laylee Kart》的驾驶座，在今年的夏日游戏节上首次亮相，IGN有幸在这款新作中试跑了几圈，开发团队中不乏曾参与备受热爱《迪迪刚赛车》的老将。

paragraphs.en: Yooka-Laylee Kart pits eight racers against each other in a heated race around courses themed after locales from the main games. In an attempt to adopt a look that is a bit of a blend of Nintendo’s 16- and 64-bit eras, Yooka-Laylee’s maps are colorful, flat tracks decorated with 3D assets outside of the tracks. The racers themselves, like my GOAT, Trowzer the Snake, appear as 3D models rendered with a filter to give the sense of pixel art. Even as a work-in-progress, this looks to be one of the more vibrant and colorful choices in the kart genre that does a good job capturing the source material.
paragraphs.cn: 《Yooka-Laylee Kart》集结八名车手，在取材自系列主线游戏场景的赛道上展开激烈竞速。为了让视觉风格融合任天堂16位和64位时代的美学，Yooka-Laylee的地图采用色彩鲜艳的平整赛道，赛道外围点缀着3D物件。车手本身，比如我最爱的蛇Trowzer，以3D模型渲染后加上滤镜，呈现出像素艺术的质感。即便尚在开发中，这看起来已是卡丁车类型里更具活力和色彩的选择之一，很好地再现了原作精神。

paragraphs.en: Being an early pre-alpha build, the core systems are in place - the driving, the zanny items, and courses - but actually playing Yooka-Laylee felt a bit rough. Driving around, even without the use of boosts, felt slippery, where I would often find myself sliding oddly into walls, frequently feeling that turning was cranked up to 11 and being far too extreme in movement. The current build lacked a mini-map or any signage to help tip you off as to what was coming up. I would find it difficult to notice what was quickly approaching, forcing me to react more violently than I normally would. Thankfully, the representative from Playtonic who was there mentioned that both the mini-map and signage were in the works, and that fine-tuning controls is a normal part of polish, so I’m not too worried when it arrives in retail, but I am keeping an eye on it.
paragraphs.cn: 作为早期pre-alpha版本，核心系统已就位——驾驶、古怪道具和赛道——但实际游玩Yooka-Laylee时手感稍显生涩。即便不用加速，开起来也感觉滑溜，我经常莫名其妙地滑向墙壁，打方向盘好像被拧到了最灵敏，动作幅度过大。目前的版本缺少小地图或指示牌，无法提前预警前方的弯道或障碍。我很难察觉快速逼近的路况，导致反应比平时更激烈。好在Playtonic的代表告诉我，小地图和指示牌都在制作中，而操控微调本身就是打磨环节的一部分，所以成品发售时我并不太担心，但仍会保持关注。

paragraphs.en: Out of all that Yooka-Laylee Kart is looking to deliver, what has me most excited and that I am more interested in is its custom rulesets that players will be able to tinker around with to create custom race types. These custom rules look to extend into the grand prix mode too, as during my cup race, I encountered races that would not only turn all racers invisible in one map, but then in the next made each racer the same character. That change specifically made the race all about mastery of the game’s systems and skill, removing any differences in weight or handling between the participants.
paragraphs.cn: 在《Yooka-Laylee Kart》预告的所有内容中，最令我兴奋和感兴趣的是玩家可以自行调整的自定义规则，以此创建独特的比赛类型。这些自定义规则似乎还能延伸到大奖赛模式，因为在杯赛期间，我遇到了一场比赛所有车手突然隐身，而下一场所有车手又变成同一个角色的情况。后一种改动让胜负完全取决于对游戏系统和技术的掌握，消除了不同车手在重量和操控上的差异。

paragraphs.en: In addition to getting to try out an early build, we also had a chance to speak with members of the development team and former Rare alums Gavin Price, founder of Playtonic and Studio / Creative Director of Yooka-Laylee Kart and Chris Sutherland, the game’s lead software engineer. Between them, their resumes included having worked on some of the best platforming games of all time including the likes of Donkey Kong Country 1 & 2, Grabbed By the Ghoulies, the Banjo-Kazooie series and, of course, the Yooka-Laylee titles!
paragraphs.cn: 除了试玩早期版本，我们还有幸采访了开发团队成员、曾经来自Rare工作室的Gavin Price（Playtonic创始人兼《Super Yooka-Laylee Kart》工作室/创意总监）以及游戏首席软件工程师Chris Sutherland。两人参与过的作品包括一些史上最佳的平台游戏，如《大金刚国度1&2》、《Grabbed By the Ghoulies》、《班卓熊》系列，当然还有《Yooka-Laylee》系列！

paragraphs.en: IGN: How did Super Yooka-Laylee Kart come to be? When did the team decide to make a kart racer?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：《Super Yooka-Laylee Kart》是如何诞生的？团队何时决定做一款卡丁车竞速游戏？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: Originally, a karting game was planned to be Playtonic’s first title before a conversation with Banjo-Kazooie composer Grant Kirkhope convinced us to start with a 3D platformer. As huge kart genre fans, we were bubbling with ideas about how we could push the genre forward, and after shipping Yooka-Replaylee, we finally had the chance to turn our attention to it following a successful prototype.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：最初，我们计划将一款卡丁车游戏作为Playtonic的首部作品，但在与《班卓熊》作曲家Grant Kirkhope交谈后，他说服我们从一部3D平台游戏开始。作为卡丁车类型的狂热粉丝，我们积攒了一堆推动这一类型前进的想法，在推出《Yooka-Replaylee》后，我们终于有了机会，通过成功的原型将注意力转向这个项目。

paragraphs.en: Chris Sutherland: We’ve wanted to work on a racing title for a long time, but about a year ago we started up a small team to explore the feasibility of a few ideas, and now we are so excited that we've announced it and it is going to become a reality!
paragraphs.cn: Chris Sutherland：我们想做一款竞速游戏已经有很长时间了，大约一年前我们组建了一个小团队，探索几个想法的可行性，现在能公布它并让它成真，我们太激动了！

paragraphs.en: IGN: Has the approach to designing a kart racer changed or evolved much from when you were working on Diddy Kong?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：与当初制作《迪迪刚赛车》时相比，设计卡丁车竞速游戏的理念变化或进化大吗？

paragraphs.en: Chris Sutherland: Ha, my main claim to DKR fame was the voice of Banjo on the selection page, which was the only time we've heard him speak!
paragraphs.cn: Chris Sutherland：哈，我在《迪迪刚赛车》中的主要成就是为选择页面上的班卓配音，那是我们唯一一次听到他开口说话！

paragraphs.en: What I can say, though, is that back then the genre was still relatively new, and so there was no defined path for what a kart racer should or should not be. Over the years, we've seen the genre evolve and streamline in certain ways, and we've looked back and wondered: what if we were to challenge many of the widely accepted norms of the kart racing genre?
paragraphs.cn: 不过我能说的是，当时这一类型还相当新，对于卡丁车竞速游戏应该做什么、不应该做什么，没有明确的路径。这些年来，我们看到这一类型以某种方式演变和精简，我们回望时不禁思考：如果我们挑战卡丁车竞速类型的诸多普遍规则，会怎样？

paragraphs.en: We wanted to explore what a modern kart racer could look like if player skill, mastery, and expression were pushed further, and whether those ideas could lead to something fresh and exciting.
paragraphs.cn: 我们想探索一下，如果进一步强调玩家技巧、精通度和自我表达，现代卡丁车竞速会是什么样子，这些想法是否能带来新鲜刺激的东西。

paragraphs.en: IGN: For the folks who previously worked on Diddy Kong Racing, what, if any, nods to that series did you bring into Yooka-Laylee Kart?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：对于此前参与过《迪迪刚赛车》的成员来说，你们有没有把什么致敬元素带到《Yooka-Laylee Kart》中？

paragraphs.en: Kevin Bayliss: We've a lot of DNA from DKR at Playtonic, so we felt it only right to give a little nod to some of the styling of the vehicles, which you can spot in details like the rear lights. One thing I really love is how the team have created 3D models reminiscent of the DKR characters, while also doing some clever work to emulate the 'rendered sprite' look that we pioneered in Donkey Kong Country, creating a retro style that still feels fresh and modern today.
paragraphs.cn: Kevin Bayliss：我们在Playtonic拥有大量来自《迪迪刚赛车》的DNA，所以觉得应该稍微致敬一下载具的设计风格，你可以在尾灯等细节上发现。我特别喜欢团队创造的3D模型，让人想起《迪迪刚赛车》的角色，同时还巧妙营造出我们在《大金刚国度》中开创的「渲染精灵」效果，创造了一种既复古又现代的风格。

paragraphs.en: Personally, I’ve only had a small amount of involvement so far, as I’ve been working on other exciting projects, but the control and racing feel exactly how you’d hope, especially with some of the original DKR team helping to shape that side of the experience.
paragraphs.cn: 就我个人而言，目前只参与了很少一部分，因为我一直在忙其他激动人心的项目，但操控和竞速手感正是你所期望的那样，尤其是有一些原《迪迪刚赛车》团队成员协助打磨这块体验。

paragraphs.en: IGN: One of the aspects I am most interested in with Super Yooka-Laylee Kart is its custom rulesets that players can set for races. Can you go into a bit of detail on how the team has gone about creating the options and which, if any, ideas proved too outlandish to incorporate into the game?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：《Super Yooka-Laylee Kart》最让我感兴趣的一点是玩家可以自定义比赛规则。能详细说说团队如何设计这些选项吗？有没有哪些想法因为太过离谱而无法加入游戏？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: We want to make one of the most replayable karting games ever, a game where friends can gather around together or play online and still find unique ways to compete for many years. We actually want a high degree of outlandish outcomes and don’t want to police what’s possible, so players can custom-create their chaos or focus on simpler, pure-skill racing and everything in between.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：我们想打造史上最具重玩性的卡丁车游戏之一，一款朋友可以聚在一起或在线游玩，并多年持续发现独特竞争方式的游戏。我们其实鼓励高度离谱的结果，并不想限制可能性，所以玩家可以定制自己的混乱或专注于更简单纯粹的技巧竞速，以及介于两者之间的所有情况。

paragraphs.en: A big part of this is letting players create their own races, rules, and rivalries, shaping the experience in ways that suit how they want to play. The ideas are still coming in thick and fast, and we think it’s an area of the game that can continue to grow after launch by combining our ideas with the fans’ ideas too. We’ll be running multiple open betas with a focus on this mode in future and look forward to trying the combinations popular with players.
paragraphs.cn: 很大一部分在于让玩家创建自己的比赛、规则和对抗关系，以适合他们想要的方式塑造体验。这些想法仍在源源不断地涌现，我们认为这是游戏发售之后可以继续成长的一个领域，通过结合我们与玩家的创意。未来我们会在该模式上开展多次公开测试，并期待尝试玩家群体喜闻乐见的组合。

paragraphs.en: IGN: What are some of the team's favorite settings to have turned on?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：团队成员最喜欢开启哪些设定？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: One immediate favourite was to turn characters off (Invisible Racers), shrink them (‘Mini Racers’ so the camera is low to the ground) and increase kart speeds. It immediately becomes very fast and unforgiving, feeling like playing F-Zero in first-person. I like bouncy collision too; it really makes choosing a character more strategic as the weight difference can have a real impact, and it’s fun to brute-force knock people out of the way, preferably into a nicely rendered nearby pool of water they sink in.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：一个立刻成为心头好的组合是关掉角色（隐形车手）、缩小角色（「迷你车手」，镜头贴近地面）并提高卡丁车速度。比赛瞬间变得极快且残酷，感觉就像第一人称的《F-Zero》。我也喜欢弹性碰撞，它让选角更具策略性，因为重量差异会有实质影响，把人粗鲁地撞开也很有趣，最好直接撞入旁边渲染精美的水池，让他们沉下去。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Are there any plans to let the community save and share specific rulesets amongst each other or host their own tournaments?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：是否有计划让社区保存和分享特定规则集，或举办自己的比赛？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: It’s on our mind. Players can create lobbies and host events with their own setups, and we would love to build on that further over time. We’d also like to utilise community-chosen favourites in things like ‘daily contests’, where everyone can try to top the leaderboard by getting the shortest total time across multiple events.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：我们有在考虑。玩家可以创建大厅、举办带有自定义设置的活动，我们也希望在此基础上进一步发展。我们还希望将社区选出的最爱组合用于「每日竞赛」之类的内容中，让所有人努力争夺排行榜榜首，争取在多个活动中取得最短总时间。

paragraphs.en: IGN: How does Yooka-Laylee fit into the world and story of the series?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：《Yooka-Laylee Kart》如何融入系列的世界观和故事？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: That’s to be revealed, but you can be sure it fits the tone and humour the series is known for. Rivalries play a big part in how that world comes to life, and we have lots of elements from the series to leverage in adjacent roles and features that are fun and that fans will enjoy.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：这有待揭晓，但可以确定它契合系列一贯的调性和幽默。对抗关系在让这个世界生动起来上起着重要作用，我们有许多系列元素可以用于附加角色和趣味功能，粉丝们一定会喜欢。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Can you explain how you landed on the aesthetic look of Kart? How did you guys do the racers themselves?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：能解释一下你们是如何确定本作的艺术风格的吗？车手本身是怎么制作的？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: We really wanted our own striking art style, something that reflected the rage and revenge mechanics, fighting game-style special moves and inputs, and suited the feel of tight, high-speed karting tracks. We also wanted something instantly recognisable that felt different from other kart racers.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：我们非常想要一个属于自己的醒目艺术风格，能反映出愤怒与复仇机制、格斗游戏式的特殊动作和输入，并能配合紧凑、高速卡丁车赛道的感受。同时还要有极高的辨识度，与其他卡丁车竞速游戏区别开来。

paragraphs.en: What we have is a balance of 2D fighting and Mode-7 style graphics with lots of modern post-processing techniques and lighting to create our own sense of beauty. We really didn’t want to go down the predictable, well-trodden path. The visuals also play an important role in readability, especially at speed, which is key for high-skill racing.
paragraphs.cn: 我们最终实现的是2D格斗与Mode-7风格画面的平衡，加上大量现代后处理技术和光照，创造出我们自己的美感。我们真的不想走那条可预见且被走烂的路。画面在可辨识性上也扮演重要角色，尤其在高速下，这对高技巧竞速至关重要。

paragraphs.en: Our characters are 3D models rendered with a 2D sprite shader from a separate camera, and the effect is very versatile, allowing us to adjust the resolution as we see fit. We’re actually thinking of exposing these values to the players, allowing them to adjust the look of the game too.
paragraphs.cn: 我们的角色是3D模型，通过一个来自独立摄像机的2D精灵着色器渲染，效果非常灵活，允许我们根据需要调整分辨率。我们实际上在考虑将这些数值开放给玩家，让他们也能调整游戏的外观。

paragraphs.en: IGN: How many characters and tracks are you aiming to include in the final release?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：你们计划在正式版中收录多少角色和赛道？

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: We’re aiming for a strong and varied lineup, and hopefully the game is a huge hit so even at launch we don’t consider it the final release. We’d love to continue adding more of both for a long time to come, and there’s always the chance of modding and cameos too. The game has a lot of potential to grow.
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：我们目标是提供一个强大且多样的阵容，希望游戏能大获成功，即便发售时我们也不视其为最终版本。我们乐意在很长一段时间内不断增加角色和赛道，同时还有可能推出模组支持和客串角色。这款游戏增长潜力很大。

paragraphs.en: Gavin Price: Dr Quack and Vendi simply because we’ve already lost too many hours thinking about whether there’s a logical answer as to how they’re actually physically capable of controlling karts…!
paragraphs.cn: Gavin Price：Dr Quack和Vendi，原因很简单：我们已经在纠结他们到底怎么能物理上操控卡丁车上花了太多时间……！

paragraphs.en: Chris Sutherland: My go-to racer is Yooka, but for a kind of development-specific reason! Yooka was one of the first characters we had up and driving around, so I think we’ve had that as the default character during development for a while, so he sticks in my head as the most familiar. And also I did the vocal sounds for him - which is why Laylee is my second favourite!
paragraphs.cn: Chris Sutherland：我的首选车手是Yooka，但这有一部分开发特定的原因！Yooka是最早动起来并驾驶的角色之一，所以我们在开发过程中有一段时间默认角色一直是他，因此他对我来说最为熟悉。而且他的语音是我配的——这也是Laylee是我第二喜欢的原因！

pending_dict.reason: 国内玩家社区长期使用的通行译名，但无官方中文名确认
